full_text:
Guo Yi (Boyi) йғӯеҘ• (дјҜзӣҠ)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Guo Yi (йғӯеҘ•), styledBoyi (дјҜзӣҠ). Son of Guo Jia, became Imperial Tutor. Well educated. Guo Yi was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
